notes: Mistral B19 + correct tRPC v10 httpBatchLink error format [{"error":{"message":"...","code":-32600,"data":{...}}}]: Same BLOCKED_MUTATION_ERROR as #273-276. 5th consecutive format attempt all produce identical silent failure. APF intercepts response (200 h2, 730B) but tRPC client-side deserialization fails → mutation error → page resets to 'Ask Le Chat' state. 5 messages left unchanged. The standard tRPC v10 error format without result/json wrappers also does not pass superjson transformer validation. Root cause confirmed: tRPC superjson transformer mismatch — the response body format is incompatible with Mistral's client-side tRPC deserialization pipeline regardless of the JSON structure used.
